title: Drostdy Hotel in Graaff-Reinet announces the arrival of Tebello Polisane as its General Manager.
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Drostdy Hotel in Graaff-Reinet announces the arrival of Tebello Polisane as its General Manager.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Drostdy Hotel in Graaff-Reinet announces the arrival of Tebello Polisane as its General Manager."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Tebello brings a wealth of experience and innovation to the forefront."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With a distinguished background in housekeeping and rooms division management, she has earned accolades for her ability to transform spaces and orchestrate teams towards delivering guest experiences. She is also excited to work with the SA College for Tourism and share her knowledge with the students, ensuring growth for the next generation of hospitality enthusiasts.","html":"With a distinguished background in housekeeping and rooms division management, she has earned accolades for her ability to transform spaces and orchestrate teams towards delivering guest experiences. She is also excited to work with the SA College for Tourism and share her knowledge with the students, ensuring growth for the next generation of hospitality enthusiasts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On her new position, Tebello comments, \"I'm honoured to join the Drostdy Hotel team - where passion truly does meet excellence. Together, we'll create unforgettable experiences that - welcoming each guest to the Karoo with open arms\"","html":"On her new position, Tebello comments, \"I'm honoured to join the Drostdy Hotel team - where passion truly does meet excellence. Together, we'll create unforgettable experiences that - welcoming each guest to the Karoo with open arms\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Additionally we express our sincere appreciation to Janus Schoeman for his dedicated service and leadership during his time as General Manager. His invaluable contributions have played a significant role in shaping the legacy of the Hotel, and we extend our best wishes for his continued success in all his future endeavors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For any Reservations at The Drostdy Hotel visit us at 30 Church Street, Graaff-Reinet, South Africa, Tel 049 892 2161 or email [email protected] or visit our website www.drostdy.co.za","html":"For any Reservations at The Drostdy Hotel visit us at 30 Church Street, Graaff-Reinet, South Africa, Tel 049 892 2161 or email [email protected] or visit our website www.drostdy.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tebello new General Manager","html":"Tebello new General Manager"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
